name: Obsidian source (example)
author: Symphony
description: Issue-source plugin for an Obsidian vault: scans markdown checkbox tasks as Symphony tasks and flips the source checkbox ([ ] → [x]) on terminal status. Reads its vault path from <install-dir>/config.json. Repackages the in-tree Obsidian connector via the @symphony/plugin-sdk provides.issueSource contract — fetch_open_issues + write_back_status, wrapped host-side into the same ingest + writeback pipeline (sync_obsidian). The in-tree chokidar watcher (a push source a sandboxed plugin can't replicate) becomes host-side polling via provides.issueSource.pollIntervalMs.
